awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: Awesome tooling and resources in the Chrome DevTools & DevTools Protocol ecosystem
awesomeListMeta.description: Awesome tooling and resources in the Chrome DevTools & DevTools Protocol ecosystem

nodes.itemHTML: • Can I DevTools? - Various workflows, documented. Also a weekly tips & tricks newsletter.
• Web cheatcodes - Browser developer tools for non-developers.
• Dear Console - A collection of snippets to use in the browser console.
• Chromelens - See how your web app will look to people with different types of vision and the path users will travel when tabbing through your page.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Libraries for driving the protocol (or a layer above)
nodes.itemHTML: • C#/.NET: Puppeteer Sharpstars2.4k - puppeteer port
• DevTools Tips - Collection of illustrated tips as mini tutorials.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

The big two automation libraries
nodes.itemHTML: • Puppeteerstars80.3k - Node.js offering a high-level API to control headless Chrome over the DevTools Protocol. See also awesome-puppeteerstars2k.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

The big two automation libraries
nodes.itemHTML: • Playwrightstars43.3k - Library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API. Available for Node.js, Python, .Net, Java. See also awesome-playwrightstars274.

nodes.itemHTML: • PHP: PuPHPeteerstars1.3k - php bridge to node puppeteer
• Inspect - Use devtools against iOS and Android, easily. Browser and Webviews. (closed source)
• ruby/debugstars771 - Debugging functionality for Ruby.
• Web Component DevTools - Inspect, modify and observe Web Components on page.

• Remote Debug Gatewaystars87 - Allows you to connect a client to multiple browsers at once.
    • Multiuser DevTools: DevTools Remotestars666 - Remotely debug someone else's browser.
• DevTools Backendstars134 - Standalone implementation of the Chrome DevTools backend to debug arbitrary web environments.
• Python CDP driver: pychromestars509 - low level CDP transport handler

• ios-webkit-debug-proxystars5.6k - Exposes Mobile Safari & UIWebView instances via the CDP.
    • Remote Debug iOS WebKit adapterstars2.6k - Builts upon ios-webkit-debug-proxy and translates WebKit's Remote Debugging Protocol API to the CDP.
• IE Diagnostics Adapterstars577 - Protocol adaptor for Microsoft IE 11 to CDP.
• go-debugger-devtoolsstars40

• Material UI Theme - Provides various Material Design inspired themes.
• TracerBenchstars220 - TracerBench is a controlled performance benchmarking tool for web applications, providing clear, actionable and usable insights into performance deltas.
• chrome-remote-interface Wiki - Many useful recipes.
• Chrome Protocol Proxystars138 - Tool for debugging clients using devtools protocol.
• chrome-devtools-frontend - Mirror of the frontend that ships in Chrome.

nodes.itemHTML: • Clojure: clj-chrome-devtoolsstars123 - The CDP wrapper API is autogenerated and will be updated when CDP protocol changes.
• ndbstars10.8k - An improved Node.js debugging experience with the DevTools Frontend.
• thetoolstars199 - CPU, memory, coverage, type profiling with Node.
• slothstars196 - Chrome extension allows to enable and save CPU and network throttling for selected tabs.
• ChromeDevTools/devtools-protocolstars838 - Canonical location of the protocol JSON. Issue tracker for protocol bugs. TypeScript types.

Chrome Debugger integration with Editors

Chrome Debugger integration with Editors
nodes.itemHTML: • Sublime Web Inspector - JavaScript Breakpoint debugging right in Sublime Text.

nodes.categoryHTML:
DevTools tooling and ecosystem

Chrome Debugger integration with Editors
nodes.itemHTML: • WebStorm/JetBrains Chrome Extension - The WebStorm IDE can debug JavaScript, view the DOM tree, and edit HTML, CSS and JS live.
• j2v8-debuggerstars73 - Debugging JavaScript running in J2V8stars2.3k with Chrome DevTools.
• Weer - A HTTP protocol debugger (closed source)
• betwixtstars4.4k - System level network proxy, providing inspection via Network panel.
• DevTools Protocol API Docs - Easy browsable UI for exploring the protocol's domains, methods and events.
• Facebook Stethostars12.6k - Native Android debugging with Chrome DevTools.
• Diracstars761 - Debugging of ClojsureScript.
• PonyDebuggerstars5.9k - Remote network and data debugging iOS apps with Chrome DevTools.
• Debugging Node.js with Chrome DevTools - Guide on using the full debugging and profiling support in Node v6.3+.
• Augury - Debugging and Profiling for Angular 2 applications.
• Wishbone python framework - Profiling data can export as .cpuprofile.

nodes.itemHTML: • PHP: chrome-devtools-protocolstars143 - A PHP client library for the protocol.

Chrome DevTools Protocol

Libraries for driving the protocol (or a layer above)
nodes.itemHTML: • Kotlin: chrome-reactive-kotlinstars71 - reactive (rxjava 2.x), low-level client library in Kotlin
• Metal.js Developer Tools - Inspect the Metal component hierarchies.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Libraries for driving the protocol (or a layer above)
nodes.itemHTML: • C#/dotnet: chrome-dev-toolsstars71 - Protocol wrapper generator that can be customized by editing handlebars templates. Includes .Net Core template.
• immutable-devtoolsstars647 - Custom formatter for Immutable-js values.
• call-tracestars30 - Can instrument your JS with hooks, and then generate a .cpuprofile of the of the complete (non-sampled) execution. View either time or call counts.
• cpuprofilifystars166 - Converts output of various profiling/sampling tools to the .cpuprofile format.
• snaplinestars391 - Converts timeline screenshots to gif.
• DevTools Timeline Viewer - Share URLs of your timeline recordings.
• Dev Tips - Large collection of tips as animated gifs.
• Clockwork - View PHP application profiling data.
• Emulated Device Lab - Experiment with multiple devices being emulated at the same time.
• RailsPanel - View Ruby on Rails application profiling data.
• React Developer Tools - Inspect the React component hierarchies.
• EmberJS Inspector - Allows you to inspect EmberJS objects in your application.
• VueJS Developer Toolsstars23k - Inspect VueJS components and manipulate their data.
• Angular Batarang - Inspect an Angular application's scope and profile its data.
• Marionette Inspector - Inspect a Marionette application's views, events, and live data.
• Backbone Debugger - Inspect a Backbone application's views, models, events, and routes.
• App Inspector for Sencha - Inspect a Sencha ExtJS/Touch application's component tree, data stores, events, and layouts.
• Redux Devtools - Inspect Redux with actions history, undo and replay.
• Three.js - Edit any three.js project.
• Insightstars899 - A WebGL debugging toolkit which enables more productive WebGL development and more efficient WebGL applications.
• BEM devtoolsstars44 - Inspect BEM entities expressed in i-bem framework.
• DevTools Author - A selection of themes to modify parts of DevTools related to authoring web applications.
• Zero Dark Matrix - Dark theme for Chrome Developer Tools.
